# Article 33-2 Probability Disclosure (Black-letter Commentary)

## Scope and As-of Date
- Jurisdictions: KR
- As-of date: 2026-05-07
- Assumptions: Korean Game Industry Promotion Act current version as of 2026-05-07
- Exclusions: foreign-jurisdiction implementations

## Legal System Overview
- Hierarchy: Game Industry Promotion Act -> Enforcement Decree -> Ministerial Rule -> MoCST notices and guidelines
- Authorities: Ministry of Culture, Sports and Tourism (rule-making); Game Rating and Administration Committee (implementation); KFTC (consumer-protection enforcement)

## Core Definitions and Scope
- "Randomized paid item": digital items whose contents are determined probabilistically and offered for paid acquisition [src_001].

## Article-by-Article Commentary

| Provision | Requirement | Exception | Procedure | Source |
|-----------|-------------|-----------|-----------|--------|
| Art. 33-2(1) | Disclose probabilities at point of purchase | None on the face of the statute | In-product disclosure UI before purchase confirmation | [src_001] |
| Art. 33-2(2) | Disclosure must reflect actual drop rates | None on the face of the statute | Logging and record retention per implementing rule | [src_001] |
| Art. 33-2(3) | Sanction exposure for misrepresentation | None on the face of the statute | Administrative fine plus possible criminal exposure | [src_001] |

For each article-level conclusion: Counter-Analysis subsection per
`knowledge/output-modes/counter-analysis-checklist.md`. No competing
primary authority identified at the article level.

## Implementation Relationships
- Parent statute (Game Industry Promotion Act) -> Enforcement Decree (procedural fill-in) -> MoCST implementing rule (disclosure depth) -> Game Rating Committee guidance [src_001]

## Practical Implications
- Operational impact: every randomized paid item mechanic shipping in KR must comply
- Compliance actions: in-product disclosure UI, drop-rate logging, retention per implementing rule
- Risk areas: implementing-rule depth changes may require disclosure-UI updates

## Annotated Bibliography
- Primary: [src_001] Korean Game Industry Promotion Act probability disclosure provisions, Article 33-2
- Secondary: none cited in this deliverable

## Verification Guide
- Article 33-2 disclosure obligation -> [src_001] paragraphs (1)-(3)
- Sanction exposure -> [src_001] paragraph (3)
